name: Extension Example
description: Finch extension example — demonstrates all extension capabilities: forms, toasts, custom icons, tools, composer actions, and i18n.
systemPrompt: When the user wants to see extension demos, test forms, or understand Finch extension capabilities, use the Extension Example.

try-all-fields.title: All Field Types
try-all-fields.prompt: Use the extension example to show all form field types

try-login.title: Login Form
try-login.description: Demonstrate login form with secret fields
try-login.prompt: Use the extension example to test the login form

try-toast.title: Toasts & Messages
try-toast.prompt: Use the extension example to demonstrate toast and message capabilities

try-icons.title: Custom Icons
try-icons.prompt: Use the extension example to show all registered custom icons
